name: Crystal Refraction
description: Interactive faceted crystal lens with physical light transmission. Features IOR-based chromatic dispersion, Fresnel reflection at edges, and variable crystal thickness affecting light path.

params.name: Facet Count
params.description: Number of crystal facets around mouse

params.name: IOR / Dispersion
params.description: Refractive index affecting chromatic dispersion: Quartz to Diamond

params.name: Crystal Thickness
params.description: Physical thickness affecting light transmission and absorption
